title: Baby Mine
writer: Margaret Mayo, F. Hugh Herbert, Lew Lipton
actors: Karl Dane, George K. Arthur, Charlotte Greenwood
plot: A young chiropractor is tricked by a tall, homely girl into marriage, but he ducks out the morning after the honeymoon. Months go by and he learns that his bride has become a mother. Obliged to his responsibilities, he returns. ho...
